claim_boundary: The arithmetic identity (N_c+1)/(2 N_c N_g)=2/9 is not a phase-transport theorem.
missing_source_objects: a source-emitted oriented U(1) flavor connection and declared loop
a gauge-invariant law fixing the total loop holonomy
an equal-link gauge convention and orientation rule
an attachment of the resulting roots to physical charged-family lines

theorem.family_gauge_boundary: Hypercharge acts on three generation copies as exp(i Y theta) I_3 and supplies a common phase, not the cyclic family shift.
theorem.physical_loop_invariant: arg(C_12 C_23 C_31)=3 delta mod 2 pi
theorem.statement: The balanced Hermitian Z3 circulant has trace 3, squared trace 6, and Q=2/3 for every phase delta. Hence balance, Z3 symmetry, and the current invariant counts do not select delta=2/9.
